_comment: Printed-arithmetic computed fields consumed by maine_forms_engine.computations. Every formula_text is the instruction printed verbatim on the blank (tests/test_computations.py re-checks this against the fetched PDF). Warnings-only: a supplied value is always written as-is.

facts.disposable_earnings.formula_text: 3. Judgment Debtor’s Disposable Earnings (line (1) minus line (2))

facts.twenty_five_percent_amount.formula_text: 4. Multiply amount on line (3) by .25 and enter answer here:
facts.twenty_five_percent_amount.note: the .25 multiplier is printed on the form

facts.excess_over_minimum_wage.formula_text: 6. Subtract line (5) from line (3) and enter answer here:

facts.maximum_withholding_amount.formula_text: 8. Enter the least of the amounts of lines (4), (6) or (7):
facts.maximum_withholding_amount.note: when line (7) is N/A (no court-ordered payment) the case value is non-numeric and this line is left for the filer, with a report note
